rulings.Case Title: LAWRENCE MOORE VS. FISCAL DYNAMICS INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Monday, August 24, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANT FISCAL DYNAMICS INC., WALTER SCAMEHORN and JOE KAISER's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Hearing Required to address whether triable issues of fact exist is amended disposition responses are accepted per CCP 2025.520. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CLARA TRIARE VS. 11TH AND KISSLING STREET TRUST ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Monday, August 24, 2015, line 2. DEFENDANT 11TH & KISSLING STREET TRUST and RAY SHAHANI's Special Motion To Strike DENIED. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. Based on broad-stroke allegations in complaint "throughout the year 2014, plaintiff received multiple verbal communications from defendant Shahani to influence or attempt to influence plaintiff to vacate the Premises through fraud, intimidation, and/or coercion," it was not "totally and completely without merit" for Defendant to infer that the complaint arises out of protected activity occurring after October 22, 2014 as described in Shahani declaration. Per Plaintiff's declaration, the alleged wrongdoings occurring after October 22, 2014 (on or about this day Shahani decided to pursue unlawful detainer) and giving rise to Plaintiff's complaint are not protected activities within the meaning of CCP 425.16. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ELIZABETH ANN CHENEY HASSUP VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Monday, August 24, 2015, line 3. PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH CHENEY HASSUP's Motion For Preliminary Injunction OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1150(a) and obtain an Order to Show Cause, required as to the parties who have not appeared in this action. Proof of Service on file indicate personal service of summons and complaint n July 31, 2015. The time for defendants to appear has not yet lapsed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BOARD OF TRUSTEE VS. ROSALBA LOPEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Monday, August 24, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANT ROSALBA LOPEZ's Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment DENIED. Moving party fails to sustain its burden under CCP 473(b). Specifically, forgetting about the hearing that Defendant set herself and "doing nothing" after receipt of the Court's order does not constitute excusable neglect. Mistake or surprise. Plaintiff requests for costs and sanctions is denied. Recovery of costs of obtaining judgment is not available on a motion to vacate when relief under CCP 473(b) is not granted. Additionally, Plaintiff fails to present any evidence of compliance with CCP 128.5(f) (i.e. separate motion, safe harbor, etc.). = (501/REQ)
